title: Hornet Removal in Ardsley, NY | $350 - $550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Ardsley, Westchester. Safe, effective hornet nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed experts serving Ardsley homes and businesses. Call today!
intro: Hornets can pose a serious threat to residents and properties throughout Ardsley, NY. Best Pest Control NYC provides professional hornet removal services to safely eliminate nests from homes, businesses, and outdoor spaces in this beautiful Westchester village. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to protect your family and property from aggressive hornet colonies.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings years of specialized experience to Ardsley, with licensed technicians who understand the unique pest challenges of Westchester County properties. We offer transparent pricing, same-day emergency service, and guaranteed results that keep your home or business hornet-free throughout the season.
localContext: Ardsley's tree-lined streets, historic homes near the Saw Mill River, and proximity to wooded areas create ideal nesting conditions for hornets, particularly in eaves, attics, and landscaped yards. From properties near Pascone Park to homes along Ardsley Road and the Ardsley Country Club area, we provide comprehensive hornet removal tailored to the village's diverse residential and commercial properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for hornet removal in Ardsley. Once on-site, most hornet nest removals take 1-2 hours depending on nest size and location. Emergency services are available for aggressive colonies threatening immediate safety.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough inspection, safe nest elimination using professional-grade products, nest removal when accessible, treatment of the surrounding area to prevent returns, and a follow-up visit if needed. Pricing varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Ardsley during certain times of year?
faqs.answer: Hornet activity in Ardsley peaks from late spring through early fall, with nests growing largest in August and September. The village's mature trees and residential landscaping provide ideal nesting sites. Early detection and removal in spring or early summer is most cost-effective and safest.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols to protect your family, pets, and property. We recommend keeping children and pets indoors during treatment, and the treated area is typically safe within 2-4 hours after service completion.
